observation: All requests observed during the loaded shell were to the loopback origin 127.0.0.1:8799 (Streamlit health, host-config, local static JS bundles, and a locally served Material Symbols woff2 font). No external host, CDN, analytics, AI, login, or remote-storage request was observed. External DOM assets: 0 at every audited viewport (see browser-audit.json).
method: In-app browser network log inspection plus Playwright per-viewport external-asset scan.
limitations: This is interface-shell evidence collected under a normal (non-sandboxed) local run, not a packet capture and not a production egress test.

The macOS sandbox egress-denied smoke test in the original P002 evidence (network-trace.json) remains the baseline for the closed-network claim; this review changed only CSS, copy, and one config flag and introduced no network call.
Production container/proxy egress isolation remains assigned to P014.
